Apple___Apple_scab.description: Apple scab is a fungal disease caused by Venturia inaequalis, affecting leaves and fruits.

Apple___Black_rot.description: Black rot is a fungal disease caused by Botryosphaeria obtusa affecting apples.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.description: Cedar apple rust is caused by Gymnosporangium juniperi-virginianae.

Apple___healthy.description: The apple plant is healthy with no visible disease symptoms.

Blueberry___healthy.description: Healthy blueberry plant with no disease symptoms.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.description: Powdery mildew is a fungal disease affecting cherry leaves.

Cherry_(including_sour)___healthy.description: Healthy cherry plant with normal foliage.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot_Gray.description: Gray leaf spot is caused by Cercospora fungi.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust.description: Common rust is a fungal disease affecting maize.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.description: Northern leaf blight is caused by Exserohilum turcicum.

Grape___Black_rot.description: Black rot is a fungal disease affecting grapevines.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).description: Esca is a complex fungal disease affecting grapevines.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.description: Leaf blight caused by Isariopsis fungi.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).description: Citrus greening is a bacterial disease spread by psyllids.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial spot affects peach leaves and fruits.

Potato___Early_blight.description: Early blight is a fungal disease affecting potatoes.

Potato___Late_blight.description: Late blight is a severe fungal disease.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.description: Leaf scorch causes reddish-brown leaf spots in strawberries.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial spot affects tomato leaves and fruits.

Tomato___Early_blight.description: Early blight is a fungal disease in tomatoes.

Tomato___Late_blight.description: Late blight causes rapid plant collapse.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.description: Leaf mold is caused by fungal infection in humid conditions.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.description: Septoria leaf spot causes severe leaf damage.

Tomato___Spider_mites_Two-spotted_spider.description: Spider mites cause stippling and webbing.

Tomato___Target_Spot.description: Target spot causes concentric lesions on tomato leaves.

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.description: A viral disease spread by whiteflies.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.description: Mosaic virus causes mottled leaf appearance.
